svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.5.2" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="d1IvjkFicdaEXN607r_z"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="743" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{"data":"@startuml
left to right direction

actor Student
actor Administrator

rectangle \"Room Reservation System\" {

 Student --> (Login student)
 Student --> (View available rooms)
 Student --> (Make reservation)
 Student --> (Cancel reservation)
 Student --> (View my reservations)

 Administrator --> (Login admin)
 Administrator --> (Manage rooms)
 Administrator --> (Conflict management)

 (Make reservation) ..> (Check availability) : <<include>>
 (Approve reservations) ..> (Make reservation) : <<include>>
 (Reject reservations) ..> (Make reservation) : <<include>>
 (Manage rooms) ..> (Check availability) : <<extends>>
 (Conflict management) ..> (Approve reservations) : <<extends>>
 (Conflict management) ..> (Reject reservations) : <<extends>>

 (Make reservation) ..> (Login student) : <<include>>
 (View my reservations) ..> (Login student) : <<include>>
 (Cancel reservation) ..> (Login student) : <<include>>

 (Manage rooms) ..> (Login admin) : <<include>>
 (Conflict management) ..> (Login admin) : <<include>>
}

@enduml","format":"svg"}" id="gnIUHqUC-EowQENOPAZg-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="586" width="1190" x="20" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
